title: Nurse.com Jobs Scraper
description: Scrape nursing jobs from Nurse.com using keyword/location filters with automatic pagination.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: Nurse.com browse URL, for example https://www.nurse.com/jobs/browse/.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword, specialty, or job title.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of jobs
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to save.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: Safety cap for API pages to request.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy settings for reliable requests.
